prompt:
Scene:
Square editorial flat lay of a fantasy field-guide spread, viewed from above on a weathered wooden desk with pressed leaves, graphite dust, and small specimen stones. The lighting is cool morning window light with soft shadows. The page design is precise and research-like but contains no readable words, only diagrams and invented symbols.

Subject:
An independent rune-like ecological symbol system for classifying imaginary forest spirits. The page shows four specimen panels, each pairing a creature silhouette, a cluster of invented angular runes, and nonverbal morphology diagrams. The glyphs use forked vertical stems, split diamonds, bark-notch marks, and small moon cuts. They should feel consistent across panels while remaining fictional and distinct from Norse runes.

Important details:
Make the layout behave like a decoder page without actual labels: clear panel borders, repeated glyph radicals, small arrows made from abstract marks, specimen sketches, and a visual taxonomy grid. The symbols should be crisp enough for visual comparison, with repeated forms implying categories. Avoid real-language text entirely, including headings. The result should read as a polished art-department prop for a novel, game, or film.

Use case:
Fictional Symbol System single study 7/8, testing a field-guide decoder layout built only from invented symbols and diagrams.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no Latin letters, no real alphabets, no Norse rune copying, no handwritten English, no numeric labels, no UI chrome, no messy notebook clutter, no translation captions.
title: Rune Field Guide
description: A field-guide decoder spread using an independent rune-like ecological glyph system.

generation.runner_notes: Independent single image focused on pseudo-decoder page layout.

en.title: Rune Field Guide
en.description: A field-guide decoder spread using an independent rune-like ecological glyph system.

zh-CN.title: 卢恩田野图鉴
zh-CN.description: 一张使用独立类卢恩生态符号系统的田野图鉴解码页。

alt.en: A fantasy field-guide page with creature diagrams and consistent invented rune clusters.
alt.zh-CN: 一页幻想田野图鉴，含生物图和一致的虚构卢恩符号组。
